beats: 林澈走到门前，凑近猫眼
通过猫眼看到空荡荡的走廊
走廊灯一盏接一盏熄灭，陷入黑暗

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 他走到猫眼前，走廊空着，灯却一盏一盏熄灭。

prompt.positive: Close-up of young man's eye pressed against peephole, distorted view of empty hallway, lights going out one by one, darkening corridor, claustrophobic, horror atmosphere, high contrast, film noir style
